text: As I walk through this modern, brightly lit interior, the slight angle of the world around me brings a feeling of disorientation—an apt metaphor, perhaps, for the uncertainty of innovation. Glass walls separate me from a space labeled R+D; I sense curiosity and anticipation, a desire to understand how humans connect and co-exist with intelligent machines. The colors are bold, the environment is structured yet open, and I feel small but also invigorated: a philosopher caught at the event horizon of progress.
